briefdescription.para: Create default frame draw options.
Create options for one fixed frame color.
Create options from a frame color sequence.

parameterdescription.para: The mode used to pick colors from the frame sequence.

briefdescription.para: The frame color sequence.

detaileddescription.para: If this contains only inherited colors, the frame inherits the full color from the buffer below.

briefdescription.para: Set a single frame color.
This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.
Set only a frame foreground color.
This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.
Set only a frame background color.
This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.
Set the frame color sequence.
The fill color sequence.

detaileddescription.para: The fill colors are applied after frameColor(), which allows subtle adjustments on top of animated borders.

briefdescription.para: Set a single fill color.
This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.
Set only a fill foreground color.
This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.
Set only a fill background color.
This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.
Set the fill color sequence.
The fill block.

detaileddescription.para: An empty block disables filling when no Tile9Style is active.

briefdescription.para: Set the fill block.

detaileddescription.para: Use Char{} to disable the fill.

briefdescription.para: The predefined frame style.
Set the predefined frame style.
The custom Char16 frame style.

detaileddescription.para: This overrides style() unless tile9Style() is also set.

briefdescription.para: Set the custom Char16 frame style.
The custom Tile9 frame style.

detaileddescription.para: This overrides both char16Style() and style(), and also controls the fill area.

briefdescription.para: Set the custom Tile9 frame style.
The combination style used for writing the frame and fill blocks.
Set the combination style.
The shared animation offset for frame and fill colors.

detaileddescription.para: This value is added to the animationCycle passed to drawFrame().

briefdescription.para: Set the animation offset for frame and fill colors.
The frame color mode.
Set the frame color mode.
The fill color mode.

detaileddescription.para: ChasingBorderCW and ChasingBorderCCW only affect frame cells.

briefdescription.para: Set the fill color mode.
Access the shared object with the default options.

detaileddescription.para: Default options use a light Unicode frame, inherited colors, no fill, and the common box frame combiner.

briefdescription.para: The options to draw a frame.

detaileddescription.para:
These options define the frame style, optional fill, combination style, and animated color behavior for Buffer::drawFrame(). The style priority is tile9Style(), then char16Style(), and finally style(). If a Tile9Style is active, it also controls the fill area and overrides fillBlock(). Frame colors are overlaid as buffer -> frameColor -> tile/block color. Fill colors are overlaid as buffer -> frameColor -> fillColor -> tile/block color.
Creating custom option instances is expensive. Reuse them across multiple drawFrame() calls.
